extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each group: I excluded all “By” rows and counted the “Against” rows across the company, subsidiaries, directors, promoters, KMP and SMP. The against rows show criminal proceedings of nil throughout, one statutory/regulatory proceeding against the Company, and 18 tax proceedings against the Company; subsidiaries have nil in all three categories, while promoter/director tax matters were excluded from the company-group tax count. For the aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries, I used the stated litigation-table amount of ₹401.40 million against the Company plus ₹Nil against subsidiaries, giving ₹40.14 crore; the ₹3.05 million personal amounts against directors/promoters were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹581.88 million as at March 31, 2025, converted to ₹58.188 crore without re-summing line items. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 40.04% for Fiscal 2025, calculated from the first five customer percentages, using revenue from operations as the denominator; the top-ten figure is the stated 56.06% for Fiscal 2025. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
